templates.name: Welcome Client
templates.subject: Welcome, {{firstName}}
templates.body: Hi {{firstName}}, welcome to {{companyName}}. I will follow up with the onboarding notes by {{dueDate}}.

templates.name: Interview Follow Up
templates.subject: Next steps for {{roleName}}
templates.body: Hello {{candidateName}}, thank you for discussing the {{roleName}} role. The team will share feedback by {{followUpDate}}.

templates.name: Invoice Reminder
templates.subject: Invoice {{invoiceNumber}} reminder
templates.body: Hi {{firstName}}, invoice {{invoiceNumber}} for {{amountDue}} is due on {{dueDate}}.
